RootLayout.description: HumanAuthn by Verifik. Enterprise-grade liveness detection, face comparison, and biometric authentication.
RootLayout.ogDescription: Enterprise-grade biometric authentication APIs by Verifik

SplashPage.metaTitle: HumanAuthn: Biometric API Demo by Verifik
SplashPage.metaDescription: Securely authenticate with liveness detection. The gold standard for digital identity verification. Powered by Verifik.
SplashPage.tagline: Securely authenticate with liveness detection. The gold standard for digital access.

home.metaDescription: Authentication anchored to human presence. Run Verifik's live biometric demos for face match, liveness, and HumanID in the browser.
home.heroBody: Run face match, liveness, HumanID, and live detection in the browser. Traditional biometrics cover server-side OpenCV collection management and search. Decentralized HumanAuthn demos show how a HumanID binds identity data to a live face without a central face database.
home.enterpriseBody: Our platform processes biometric data with end-to-end encryption. Privacy by design, ready for serious deployments.

create-collection.title: Create Collection
create-collection.description: Create a named face collection to group enrolled persons for search and verification.

create-person.title: Create Person
create-person.description: Enroll a new person by uploading face images and metadata. Stored in an OpenCV collection.

create-person-with-liveness.title: Create Person with Liveness
create-person-with-liveness.description: Enroll a person while simultaneously running a liveness check and searching the collection for duplicates.

update-person.title: Update Person
update-person.description: Load a person by id and change profile fields or collection membership (no new face images in this API).

delete-person.title: Delete Person
delete-person.description: Delete a person completely or remove them from a single collection when they belong to several.

search-person.title: Search Person
search-person.description: Upload one or more face images and search the collection for matching persons by similarity score.

search-live-person.title: Search Live Person
search-live-person.description: Capture a live face, run liveness detection, and search the collection for a match in one flow.

search-active-user.title: Search Active User
search-active-user.description: Authenticate an active user with a live face capture and return a liveness score alongside search results.

detect-face.title: Detect Face
detect-face.description: Submit an image and detect all faces it contains, returning bounding boxes and crop data.

search-crops.title: Search Crops
search-crops.description: Run a multi-image crop search to find matching persons across uploaded face crops with precision tuning.

face-comparison.title: Face Comparison
face-comparison.description: Upload two photos and see if they are the same person. Useful for onboarding and ID checks.

face-comparison-liveness.title: Compare with Liveness
face-comparison-liveness.description: Match a reference photo to a live selfie. Liveness runs only after the face match looks strong enough.

verify-face.title: Verify Face
verify-face.description: Verify a face image against a specific enrolled person by ID with a configurable similarity threshold.

liveness.title: Liveness Detection
liveness.description: Show that a real person is in front of the camera, not a photo, mask, or replay.

humanid-create.title: Create HumanID
humanid-create.description: Bind public identity data and a face to an encrypted HumanID proof stored on IPFS. Recoverable only by the live face.

humanid-create-qr.title: Create HumanID QR
humanid-create-qr.description: Generate a QR-coded HumanID from a face capture and identity metadata for portable offline verification.

humanid-decrypt.title: Decrypt HumanID
humanid-decrypt.description: Recover the identity data in a HumanID by presenting the matching live face and the proof string.

humanid-preview.title: Preview HumanID
humanid-preview.description: Inspect the public metadata inside a HumanID string without a face image or extra credentials.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: This page does not exist or the link is invalid.
